CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-13-2024 Off Calendar

MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD
Off Calendar Apr-05-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing re: DEFENDANT DONALD PUTTERMAN, CONSTANCE YU, MICHELLE LANDRY, PUTTERMAN LANDRY + YU LLP, PUTTERMAN YU LLP MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendants' petition to confirm the arbitration award is granted. No substantive opposition was filed. The parties may resolve the issue regarding whether the court-not the arbitrator-can award fees and costs per the cost memorandum, motion to tax, and motion-for-fees process outlined in CRC 3.1700 and CRC 3.1702.

Order signed. Judgment signed.

Judge: Rochelle C. East; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RCE)
